response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community technical initiatives
Proven ability to build scalable, event-driven systems (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or OPC UA
No demonstrable experience with on-premises industrial automation platforms or real-time embedded systems
